name: auctionhub
description: Unified browsing and ingestion MVP for online vehicle auction listings.

scripts.check: node --check server.js && node --check scripts/ingest.js && node --check src/ingestion/pipeline.js && node --check src/ingestion/intelligence.js && node --check src/ingestion/adapters/websiteCrawler.js && node --check src/ingestion/adapters/renderedCrawler.js && node --check src/ingestion/sourceParsers.js && node --check src/ingestion/robots.js && node --check app.js
